description: "Positive Affirmations For Self-Transformation" is a collection of inspirational words & phrases (spoken very slowly and gently so that you can repeat-a-long with me), accompanied by classical piano & ocean waves, to help attract happiness & balance into your life. Let your body and mind relax, and allow your beautiful self to take in some good energy. Written and performed by Grant Raymond Barrett.     I dedicate this recording to a "special person" and am grateful for your kindness and am very glad the meditation of affirmations has been helpful.  May you and everyone be abundantly blessed with love, goodness and great health every day!  Thank you for listening and for your good energy.
subject: Meditation Positive Affirmations
title: Positive Affirmations For Self-Transformation (Longer Version)
